caption: A laptop sits atop a blue fabric surface in a brightly lit room with white curtains and sunlight streaming in from the right. The screen displays a website with a header that reads "LIVE @ TFNN.COM" and "TIGER TECHNICIANS NETWORK". A dark blue banner stretches across the bottom of the scene, featuring the name "Basil Chapman" in large white font, with the subtext "The Tiger Technicians Hour | June 8th, 2022" below it. In the first two frames, the laptop screen shows a specific video page with a video player at the top and a list of other videos below. In the latter two frames, the view on the laptop screen shifts, showing a grid of various video thumbnails, indicating that the user has navigated to a different section or scrolled down the page. The physical setting and the on-screen banner remain static throughout the clip.
